pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the release configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin to enforce the target Java version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the compiler may not strictly enforce the target bytecode version specified by the java.version property, potentially leading to compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to the annotation processor paths in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this path, MapStruct and Lombok may not cooperate correctly during annotation processing, leading to compilation errors or missing generated code.
